_comment: Example aikit configuration. Copy to aikit.config.json (repo root) or .aikit/config.json and edit. Precedence: built-in defaults < aikit.config.json < .aikit/config.json < CLI flags. All keys are optional; defaults preserve the legacy review-bundle behavior. This example file itself is NOT loaded by aikit (only aikit.config.json / .aikit/config.json are).

bundle._comment: single_file=true writes one bundle file with the manifest embedded and no review directory or sidecar manifest.json; then `output` is the bundle FILE path (default tmp/review_bundle.txt). When single_file=false (directory mode), `output` is the output ROOT directory (default .aikit/outputs) and is omitted here.

discovery._comment: Enhanced anchor discovery. include_globs allowlists otherwise-ignored files to pull in (matched by path; protective default excludes always apply and exclude_globs adds more). include_files are explicit paths always bundled when present.

script_runner._comment: Cross-OS runner detection for `aikit script run/check`. Selection order: explicit --runner > extension_map (below) > shebang (when detect_from_shebang) > built-in extension map > OS-aware fallback. preferred_runners reorders candidates globally. extension_map keys are extensions (with leading dot); values are candidate runner names tried in order. An empty extension_map uses the built-in defaults.
